title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Coursera India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Teacher based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
